properties.name: Former PFAFF Industrial Site
properties.description: Approximate area of the former PFAFF industrial site in western Kaiserslautern.
properties.historical_relevance: Represents one of the most important industrial production areas in Kaiserslautern and the later transformation into the Pfaff-Quartier.

properties.name: Kammgarn Former Factory Area
properties.description: Approximate area of the former spinning factory now used as the Kammgarn cultural center.
properties.historical_relevance: Shows the reuse of former industrial architecture as a cultural venue.
properties.historical_period: Industrial period to present cultural reuse
